arabic:
عن أبى هريرة رضى الله عنه قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏:‏ ‏
"‏إذا دعي أحدكم ، فليجب، فإن كان صائما فليصل، وإن كان مفطراً فليطعم‏"‏ .‏‏‏((رواه مسلم))‏

english.narrator: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported:
english.text:
The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "When any of you is invited to a meal, he should accept the invitation. If he is observing Saum (fasting), he should supplicate for the betterment of the host and if he is not fasting, he should eat."

.

chapter.english: The Book About the Etiquette of Eating
